2603.21440.title: KG-Hopper: Empowering Compact Open LLMs with Knowledge Graph Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning
2603.21440.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate impressive natural language capabilities but often struggle with knowledge-intensive reasoning tasks. Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA), which leverages structured Knowledge Graphs (KGs) exemplifies this challenge due to the need for accurate multi-hop reasoning. Existing approaches typically perform sequential reasoning steps guided by predefined pipelines, restricting flexibility and causing error cascades due to isolated reasoning at each step. To address these limitations, we propose KG-Hopper, a novel Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework that empowers compact open LLMs with the ability to perform integrated multi-hop KG reasoning within a single inference round. Rather than reasoning step-by-step, we train a Reasoning LLM that embeds the entire KG traversal and decision process into a unified ``thinking'' stage, enabling global reasoning over cross-step dependencies and dynamic path exploration with backtracking. Experimental results on eight KG reasoning benchmarks show that KG-Hopper, based on a 7B-parameter LLM, consistently outperforms larger multi-step systems (up to 70B) and achieves competitive performance with proprietary models such as GPT-3.5-Turbo and GPT-4o-mini, while remaining compact, open, and data-efficient. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/Wangshuaiia/KG-Hopper.
2603.21440.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）展現了令人印象深刻的自然語言能力，但在知識密集型推理任務中經常面臨挑戰。知識庫問答（KBQA）利用結構化知識圖譜（KGs），由於需要準確的多跳推理，這一挑戰尤為明顯。現有的方法通常依賴預定義的流程執行順序推理步驟，限制了靈活性，並因為每一步的孤立推理而導致錯誤級聯。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了KG-Hopper，一種新穎的強化學習（RL）框架，使緊湊的開放式LLMs具備在單次推理回合內執行整合的多跳KG推理的能力。我們訓練了一個推理LLM，將整個KG遍歷和決策過程嵌入到統一的“思考”階段，從而實現對跨步依賴關係的全局推理和動態路徑探索及回溯。在八個KG推理基準上的實驗結果顯示，基於7B參數LLM的KG-Hopper始終超越更大的多步系統（高達70B），並在保持緊湊、開放和數據高效的同時，與專有模型如GPT-3.5-Turbo和GPT-4o-mini達成競爭性的表現。代碼可在以下網址公開獲取：https://github.com/Wangshuaiia/KG-Hopper。
2603.21440.author: Shuai Wang et.al.
